story.title: Iran war day 76: Vance says progress made in talks; Israel pounds Lebanon
story.summary: US Vice President Vance says progress is being made in talks with Iran as President Trump begins his trip to China.
story.selection_reason: The ongoing Iran war has significant global implications, and the 76th day of the conflict, with progress in talks and Israel pounding Lebanon, is a critical development with far-reaching consequences.
